---
title: "Projects"
format: html
---

## 📦 Projects

A selection of my data science, R projects, and creative work.

---

### 💻 Fun R Things

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)

items <- yaml::read_yaml("data/fun_r.yml")

for (row in items) {

  cat("### ", row$title, "\n\n")
  cat("*", row$type, "*\n\n")
  cat(row$description, "\n\n")

  # links
  if (!is.null(row$links)) {
    for (nm in names(row$links)) {
      url <- row$links[[nm]]
      cat("🔗 [", toupper(nm), "](", url, ")\n\n", sep="")
    }
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```

### 🎨 Stats Comics

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

comics <- yaml::read_yaml("data/comics.yml")

for (c in comics) {

  cat("### ", c$title, "\n\n")

  # image
  cat("![](", c$file, ")\n\n", sep="")

  # caption
  if (!is.null(c$caption)) {
    cat(c$caption, "\n\n")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```

### ✍🏽 Microblogs

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

posts <- yaml::read_yaml("data/microblogs.yml")

for (p in posts) {

  cat("### ✨ ", p$title, "\n\n")

  cat("*", p$year, "*\n\n")

  cat(p$description, "\n\n")

  # link (your structure uses link$post)
  if (!is.null(p$link$post)) {
    cat("🔗 [Read more](", p$link$post, ")\n\n", sep="")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
